headline: Builders FirstSource Board Resignation Puts Valuation And Governance In Focus
summary: Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) board member Mark A. Alexander has resigned from the board. The company cited health reasons for his departure and indicated the move is not related to any disagreement with the company. Builders FirstSource supplies building materials, manufactured components, and construction services to professional contractors and homebuilders. For investors watching NYSE:BLDR, governance changes such as a board resignation sit alongside industry factors such as...
